ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>The response is contextually relevant and consistent with the persona but lacks a bit of naturalness in tone, maintaining overall quality.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>While generous, this answer feels slightly disconnected from context and doesn't fully utilize the persona of a Temple Priest who would be more observant.
